title: Per-Call Reliability Characterisation
hypothesis: A MockLLMClient with fail_after=N raises LLMClientError on exactly call N+1, giving exactly N successful calls. This holds deterministically for N in [0, 1, 2, 3, 5].

result.summary: Experiment failed with unhandled exception: MockLLMClient.complete() got an unexpected keyword argument 'system_prompt'
errors: TypeError: MockLLMClient.complete() got an unexpected keyword argument 'system_prompt'
